name: thoughttracker
description: AI-powered transcript analysis & evidence explorer for YouTube creators

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace backend && npm install --workspace frontend
scripts.dev: node scripts/doctor.mjs && node scripts/start-postgres.mjs && npm run dev:app
scripts.dev:app: npm run setup:local-ai && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:full: node scripts/doctor.mjs --with-ml && node scripts/start-postgres.mjs && concurrently -n ml,backend,frontend -c green,blue,magenta "node scripts/start-ml-service.mjs" "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
